voice_observations.caption_text:
No te puedes perder el menú de esta semana✨ Regreso el Tres Leches Cake en tamaño familiar y los lunes de galletas minis! April 29-May 4👇

SHAREABLE TRES LECHES CAKE—the dessert you know and love, now in family size! 🏡 A light, fluffy vanilla cake soaked in a classic tres leches sauce, topped with whipped cream, and sprinkled with a layer of cinnamon. Available this week only, so start thinking of who you want to share it with. 🤭 🍰

🍭 CLASSIC PINK SUGAR
An all-time favourite—a vanilla sugar cookie topped with a perfect pink swoop of real almond frosting.

🥜 PEANUT BUTTER MUNCH
A warm peanut butter cookie topped with milk chocolate, a crunch of peanut butter-coated cereal pieces, and a sprinkle of icing sugar.

🫐 BLUEBERRY MUFFIN
A warm blueberry cookie smothered in a buttery cake glaze and topped with a delightful crunch of blueberry muffin streusel.

🍫 TRIPLE CHOCOLATE CHIP
A chocolate cookie packed with semi-sweet chunks, creamy white chips, and milk chocolate chips.

🎡 CHURRO
A warm cookie bursting with cinnamon flavour and topped with a swirl of smooth cinnamon buttercream and a dusting of cinnamon sugar.

🍪 SEMI-SWEET CHOCOLATE CHUNK
Chocolate chip, but make it chunky—a delicious cookie filled with irresistible semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.
voice_observations.hook_text: No te puedes perder el menú de esta semana✨
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Watch back, we gon' rock till the game crack back, back, back, back All the niggas, till the boys walk, all the niggas crush that Till the king bop, bop, bop, bop, bop And the show feel good with that bop, bop To the niggas, feelin' alright Till the game when the head is full, man, ah, ah, ah And the show feel good with that bop, bop To the niggas, feelin' alright Till the game when the head is full, man, ah, ah, ah And the show feel good with that bop, bop
